Recycled materials
Contains at least 50% recycled material.
As certified by
Global Recycled Standard

Global Recycled Standard

Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products contain recycled content that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from the source to the final product and meet social, environmental, and chemical requirements. The purchase of Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products supports the use of recycled content in the supply chain. A product must contain at least 50% certified GRS material to qualify for inclusion in Climate Pledge Friendly.

Learn more about this certification

Certification number

TE-00320194

Certification body

Bureau Veritas

Instalments by Barclays
(Application required)
Instalments by Barclays is a reusable credit line that lets you spread the cost of purchases over £100 across fixed monthly payments.
If approved, you can make as many purchases as you like without reapplying. Barclays will check your financial circumstances haven’t changed each time and the amount you’ll pay is within your credit and monthly payment limits. These checks won’t affect your credit score.
Subject to application, financial circumstances and borrowing history. Representative Example: Credit Limit: £1200, Annual Interest Rate 19.2% (variable), Representative 19.2% APR (variable). Get your estimated trade-in value
How Trade-in works
How Trade-in works
  1. Select Get your estimated trade-in value to get your device's trade-in value on our partner's site.
  2. Find your device by choosing your device brand and model or entering the IMEI number (smartphones only).
  3. Answer a few questions about condition.
  4. Get your estimated trade-in value.
  5. Prepare your device: back up your data, log out of apps and accounts, remove security locks and factory reset your device.
  6. Ship your device for free using the provided label.
  7. Our partner will verify device condition upon receipt. Final value may vary if condition differs from assessment.
  8. Get paid on your bank account within 3-5 business days after verification.

Brand ACEMAGIC
Model name LX15PRO
Screen size 15.6 Inches
Colour Gray
Hard disk size 512 GB
CPU model Ryzen 5
RAM memory installed size 16 GB
Operating system Windows 11 Pro
Special feature HD Audio, Lightweight, Memory Card Slot, Numeric Keypad
Graphics card description AMD Radeon RX Vega 8
See more

About this item

  • 【Ryzen 5 7430U Processor】Speed Meets Efficiency, ACEMAGIC LX15 PRO Tackle daily tasks effortlessly with the Ryzen 5 7430U CPU processor with 8 cores and 16 threads up to 4.3GHz, (MULTI Running points 8124 / SINGLE Running points 1461). Ideal for office work, light gaming, and seamless multitasking without lag.
  • 【16GB DDR4 RAM + 512GB SSD】Future-Ready Performance, Enjoy rapid app launches and smooth operation with 16GB DDR4 RAM 512GB SSD. Expand storage up to (64GB DDR4 RAM + 4TB SSD).Our laptop come with a built-in M.2 2280 NVME PCIE3.0 high-speed SSD, based on the NVME protocol with PCIE3.0 channels for amazing sequential read and write speeds. For games, movies, or projects, plus a Micro SD slot for instant file transfers.
  • 【1080 FHD IPS Display with WIFI 6】LX15pro Laptop Dive into sharp, 15.6-inch 16:9 IPS screen boasting 1920x1080 resolution and 60Hz refresh rate. Perfect for multitasking, streaming movies, or editing photos with wide 180° viewing angles and vivid colour accuracy. Notice：Equipped with WiFi 6.0, compatible with 2.4GHz and 5GHz frequency bands, the transmission rate is nearly 3 times that of WiFi 5. Entertainment work no longer requires waiting for annoying refresh times.
  • 【Enhanced Multimedia Experience】Dual 4Ω/1.5W speakers with noise-canceling technology deliver crisp audio for video calls or music, while the DMIC microphone captures clear voice input. The responsive all-in-one touchpad and 1MP (1280x720) front-facing camera is capable of daily video calls and online meetings.
  • 【All-Day Battery Life and Efficient Heat Dissipation】The 11.4V/4800mAh (54.72Wh) lithium-polymer battery—perfect for commutes, coffee shops, or back-to-back meetings. Recharges quickly with the included 65W adapter. Equipment a single fan + dual copper pipe cooling system. This design effectively reduces the temperature of the computer during high load operation and prevents performance degradation and hardware damage caused by overheating.
  • 【Versatile and Upgradeable Design】The laptops is also equipped with a wealth of external ports, including headphone jacks, three USB 3.2 Gen2 ports, DC power connector, WIFI 6.0, TYPE-C (Data), and HDMI 1.4 ports. It is convenient to connect various peripherals, such as headset, external monitor, etc., to meet the diverse needs of user.
› See more product details
Sustainability features
This product has sustainability features recognised by trusted certifications.
  • Recycled materials: Contains at least 50% recycled material. Certified by Global Recycled Standard.
  • Safer chemicals: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment. Certified by Global Recycled Standard.
  • Worker well-being: Manufactured on farms or in facilities that protect the rights and/or health of workers. Certified by Global Recycled Standard.

    Global Recycled Standard

    Global Recycled Standard

    Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products contain recycled content that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from the source to the final product and meet social, environmental, and chemical requirements. The purchase of Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products supports the use of recycled content in the supply chain. A product must contain at least 50% certified GRS material to qualify for inclusion in Climate Pledge Friendly.

    Learn more about this certification

    Certification body

From the brand

Previous page

  2. Laptop

  9. ACEMAGIC is a company integrating R&D, production and sales. Immersed in the electronics manufacturing industry for many years, we have formed a complete and mature supply chain system. We pay attention to the voice of customers and constantly create better products. We hope that our products can make people more beautiful life.

    ACEMAGIC offers laptop computer with different CPU, memory, hard disk configurations, suitable for a variety of uses.

  12. Professional R&D team

    Production directly connects with consumers

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers find this laptop performs smoothly and runs games like League of Legends without issues, with a crisp IPS display and loud speakers. Moreover, the device is well-built, turns on quickly, and offers good value for money. Additionally, the battery lasts for hours on end, and one customer notes the cooling system remains near-silent.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    "I’ve been using this laptop for a week and I’m happy with it. The processor is fast and handles my daily tasks with ease...." Read more
    "...Looks clean, runs fast, no drama. I've been using it daily for work without any issues...." Read more

    "This laptop offers a very high specification for its price. Everything works perfectly except for one feature which is a bit of an irritation...." Read more

    "...Impressive speed, sound build and simple upgrades, absolutely worth every penny." Read more

    "...Battery lasts well, WiFi performance good and graphics good middle of the road only tested with Guild Wars 2 though" Read more
    "...HDMI and USB-C make docking effortless, and the battery comfortably survives the morning commute, an entire day in the office, and the journey..." Read more

    "This computer's been solid. Just super chill to use. It's one of those things that just works, and you don't even really notice it...." Read more
    "Quick to start up, almost silent fans and a sleek aluminium shell give the ACEMAGIC LX15 Pro an immediate air of maturity...." Read more

    Amazon Customer
    5.0 out of 5 stars

    Images in this review

    Previous slide
    Next slide
    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    Fantastic laptop
    I decided to purchase this laptop for myself to replace my old laptop that had finally given up on me. This laptop arrived well packed and very quickly. This laptop comes installed with Windows 11 Pro and has a very fast AMD Ryzen 7 8 core processor with 16GB DDR4 RAM so everything runs very quickly and smoothly. You get a 512GB SSD which you can upgrade up to 4TD if you wish to do so. I often play the odd game here and there and this laptop is perfectly equipped to cope with the demands of games like Fortnite and Roblox. I managed to play a few games of Fortnite without any issues at all with setting on medium to low. The screen is very bright and perfect for everyday use as well as watching movies/tv shows with the speakers being nice and loud. The battery life I have found to be extremely good and can easily last me for hours on end if normal everyday use. This laptop feels very well made and the hinge is very smooth. The keyboard is nice and quiet and very accurate and responsive. You also get WiFi 6 so your connection is always strong and fast. Overall I have been really surprised by the performance of this laptop and for the following reasons I have decided to rate it 5 stars: Very powerful and fast Excellent screen Great speakers Excellent build quality Great for casual gaming
    MoreHide
    Thank you for your feedback
    Sorry, there was an error

    Top reviews from United Kingdom

    There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

    • Mr. S. R. Fenn
      5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent value for money laptop
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 10 February 2026
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      The laptop provides excellent value for money for a well specced gaming laptop. it has been used extensively and runs gaming programmes well with no frame drop or stuttering. The laptop has great functionality and does all that can be asked for it. The battery life is good and so far the laptop has proved to be reliable. I have reached out for support and their response was good and concluded with no issues so it is good to know the seller stands by the product. A recommended good value laptop!
      Read more

      5.0 out of 5 stars Fantastic laptop
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 11 June 2025
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      The media could not be loaded.
      I decided to purchase this laptop for myself to replace my old laptop that had finally given up on me.
      This laptop arrived well packed and very quickly.
      This laptop comes installed with Windows 11 Pro and has a very fast AMD Ryzen 7 8 core processor with 16GB DDR4 RAM so everything runs very quickly and smoothly. You get a 512GB SSD which you can upgrade up to 4TD if you wish to do so.
      I often play the odd game here and there and this laptop is perfectly equipped to cope with the demands of games like Fortnite and Roblox. I managed to play a few games of Fortnite without any issues at all with setting on medium to low.
      The screen is very bright and perfect for everyday use as well as watching movies/tv shows with the speakers being nice and loud.
      The battery life I have found to be extremely good and can easily last me for hours on end if normal everyday use.
      This laptop feels very well made and the hinge is very smooth. The keyboard is nice and quiet and very accurate and responsive.
      You also get WiFi 6 so your connection is always strong and fast.
      Overall I have been really surprised by the performance of this laptop and for the following reasons I have decided to rate it 5 stars:
      Very powerful and fast
      Excellent screen
      Great speakers
      Excellent build quality
      Great for casual gaming

      Graham Thompson
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Fantastic laptop

      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 11 June 2025
      I decided to purchase this laptop for myself to replace my old laptop that had finally given up on me.
      This laptop arrived well packed and very quickly.
      This laptop comes installed with Windows 11 Pro and has a very fast AMD Ryzen 7 8 core processor with 16GB DDR4 RAM so everything runs very quickly and smoothly. You get a 512GB SSD which you can upgrade up to 4TD if you wish to do so.
      I often play the odd game here and there and this laptop is perfectly equipped to cope with the demands of games like Fortnite and Roblox. I managed to play a few games of Fortnite without any issues at all with setting on medium to low.
      The screen is very bright and perfect for everyday use as well as watching movies/tv shows with the speakers being nice and loud.
      The battery life I have found to be extremely good and can easily last me for hours on end if normal everyday use.
      This laptop feels very well made and the hinge is very smooth. The keyboard is nice and quiet and very accurate and responsive.
      You also get WiFi 6 so your connection is always strong and fast.
      Overall I have been really surprised by the performance of this laptop and for the following reasons I have decided to rate it 5 stars:

             Report
    • NF
      4.0 out of 5 stars Great bang-for-buck power with a cheap keyboard/trackpad in a nice shell.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 10 October 2025
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      Incredibly good bang-for-buck, built for nerds like us who are trying to squeeze every last bit of performance out for the price point. I personally hate looking into laptops knowing I could buy something cheaper and more powerful as a desktop.

      Since I had to sacrifice logic for portability, this is a great option. The only caveat is the build quality: The keyboard and trackpad are sub-par at best - likely due to using cheap second-hand parts from other laptops in order to meet the price point. It's also English US layout. The upside is mine included a membrane-like cover with the UK layout that fits snugly on top.

      The rest of the shell/body otherwise feels extremely sturdy and made from good materials. You also get a privacy slider for the webcam like Lenovo laptops.

      I've had to send mine back after 2 weeks from a few faulty keys.
      If it wasn't in warranty, however, I can easily find replacement parts online after some googling. It's also intuitive to open up with no warranty void stickers covering the screws.
      The parts also don't cost a small fortune compared to the big brands consumed by planned obsolescence (I'm looking at you, HP).
      If you're confident with diagnosing tech I'd say this was much more 'welcoming' to take apart. Another big win in my book was the upgradeability as described.

      Besides that, if you know what you're doing with your OS/software this is a great option for the power - or as a windows alternative to a macbook.

      The upside with this compared to a Mac is you can always choose to install linux. Since it's AMD hardware it'll play ball nicer with drivers, etc, for that OS.

      I personally wouldn't game on anything without dedicated graphics. However, if you want to do some 'light' gaming the APU will be powerful enough to sustain good performance. Games like Rise Of The Tomb Raider are playable, but you'll have to make some sacrifices.

      Noise levels are pretty good, but comparing laptop noise is like comparing jet engines (unless you buy one of those super efficient low-power chips in <£100 chromebooks... or a Mac).
      General heat dissipation felt well managed (as long as you're not an idiot and suffocating the bottom intake grill on a blanket).

      My personal use case desired creative media performance.
      The IPS screen is nice, although a little bright and washed out even at lower brightness settings. The upside is that's also a cheap replacement.
      The multi-core performance seemed pretty adequate for my general editing and rendering tasks - if I needed to work on something away from my main beefy machine.

      Dealing with Windows 11 has its caveats compared to 10, but taking the time to do some modifying and adjustments meant it ran pretty smooth. I had to deal with 3 separate blue screens and resets, thanks to Win11 not updating itself correctly and giving me fatal memory errors (even though that's usually the BIOS' job to tell me). It seems to be a common issue amongst 11 users so a quick command prompt fix was available.
      Bear in mind this is the stage your OS *could* be in when you order it. Top tip is to just let it look for updates for a while after connecting to the internet (thank God for whoever turned off that requirement in order to set up Win11 Pro).

      If this random company decides to improve the keyboard/trackpad on their next similarly-priced model in the future I'll give them 5 stars.
      Read more
      NF
      4.0 out of 5 stars
      Great bang-for-buck power with a cheap keyboard/trackpad in a nice shell.

      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 10 October 2025
      Incredibly good bang-for-buck, built for nerds like us who are trying to squeeze every last bit of performance out for the price point. I personally hate looking into laptops knowing I could buy something cheaper and more powerful as a desktop.

      Since I had to sacrifice logic for portability, this is a great option. The only caveat is the build quality: The keyboard and trackpad are sub-par at best - likely due to using cheap second-hand parts from other laptops in order to meet the price point. It's also English US layout. The upside is mine included a membrane-like cover with the UK layout that fits snugly on top.

      The rest of the shell/body otherwise feels extremely sturdy and made from good materials. You also get a privacy slider for the webcam like Lenovo laptops.

      I've had to send mine back after 2 weeks from a few faulty keys.
      If it wasn't in warranty, however, I can easily find replacement parts online after some googling. It's also intuitive to open up with no warranty void stickers covering the screws.
      The parts also don't cost a small fortune compared to the big brands consumed by planned obsolescence (I'm looking at you, HP).
      If you're confident with diagnosing tech I'd say this was much more 'welcoming' to take apart. Another big win in my book was the upgradeability as described.

      Besides that, if you know what you're doing with your OS/software this is a great option for the power - or as a windows alternative to a macbook.

      The upside with this compared to a Mac is you can always choose to install linux. Since it's AMD hardware it'll play ball nicer with drivers, etc, for that OS.

      I personally wouldn't game on anything without dedicated graphics. However, if you want to do some 'light' gaming the APU will be powerful enough to sustain good performance. Games like Rise Of The Tomb Raider are playable, but you'll have to make some sacrifices.

      Noise levels are pretty good, but comparing laptop noise is like comparing jet engines (unless you buy one of those super efficient low-power chips in <£100 chromebooks... or a Mac).
      General heat dissipation felt well managed (as long as you're not an idiot and suffocating the bottom intake grill on a blanket).

      My personal use case desired creative media performance.
      The IPS screen is nice, although a little bright and washed out even at lower brightness settings. The upside is that's also a cheap replacement.
      The multi-core performance seemed pretty adequate for my general editing and rendering tasks - if I needed to work on something away from my main beefy machine.

      Dealing with Windows 11 has its caveats compared to 10, but taking the time to do some modifying and adjustments meant it ran pretty smooth. I had to deal with 3 separate blue screens and resets, thanks to Win11 not updating itself correctly and giving me fatal memory errors (even though that's usually the BIOS' job to tell me). It seems to be a common issue amongst 11 users so a quick command prompt fix was available.
      Bear in mind this is the stage your OS *could* be in when you order it. Top tip is to just let it look for updates for a while after connecting to the internet (thank God for whoever turned off that requirement in order to set up Win11 Pro).

      If this random company decides to improve the keyboard/trackpad on their next similarly-priced model in the future I'll give them 5 stars.

    • Paul S Rose
      5.0 out of 5 stars Great value and performance
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 19 January 2026
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      Nicely made with plenty of ports and super fast performance. It took a few cycles of Windows 11 updates to get fully up and running and at one point it seemed that it had frozen mid update and required a hard restart to complete. The WhatsApp support from the manufacturer was great during the updating process. This is my second Acemagic PC and they are extremely good value for money
      Read more

    • Arham K
      5.0 out of 5 stars Fast laptop
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 3 April 2025
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      The laptop has a really good CPU, capable of having multiple things open and now slow down a bit, even though I use dual extended screens while working.

      It's degin is unique, as it is metallic and has curves, something which most laptops skip and go for rectangular shapes. Also, being fully metallic, offers a sturdy body, which doesn't bend or deform with pressure. It also has large cooling vents and with the powerful fan, it didn't thermal throutle at all even in intense rendering.

      The display has a great colour range, brightness, and contrast, pleasant to the eye.

      The only downside I found was that it's not really gaming oriented, as it claims to be, because it lacks a dedicated GPU, but I already knew since in the description it said about it so be mindful. Otherwise, perfect for work and personal use.
      Read more
      19 people found this helpful

      5.0 out of 5 stars Very dependable and capable laptop
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 8 February 2026
      Size Name: 15.6 Inch-AMD R5 7430UVerified Purchase
      Had this for a few months now and it’s a brilliant performer- handled everything with ease. I like that it has plenty of ports with a variety of USB types. My experience of it so far has given me a high level of confidence in it.

    See more reviews

    Top reviews from other countries

    Translate all reviews to English
    • Alberto Pinna
      5.0 out of 5 stars Un ottimo laptop ad un giusto prezzo
      Reviewed in Italy on 4 November 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Il Laptop corrisponde perfettamente alla descrizione, viene fornito con un cavo di alimentazione lungo ben 2 metri. Devo verificare se sia possibile caricarlo anche attraverso l'utilizzo della porta type-c alimentata, servirebbe un caricabatterie da almeno 65W, vedremo...L'imballaggio di amazon non era sufficiente a garantirne l'integrità ma alla fine il laptop non ha subito danni, anche perchè la confezione originale era perfettamente in grado di preservarlo da urti. La qualità audio è buona, sufficiente per ascoltare musica e video senza avere troppe pretese, i bassi sono appena sufficienti. L'hardware è di alto profilo, tanto che per avere le stesse caratteristiche con marchi blasonati occorrerebbe spendere cifre molto più alte. Non posso esprimermi per il gaming, non sono un appassionato, ma per un utilizzo quotidiano, office e navigazione o guardare film in streaming, è assolutamente perfetto, è anche possibile potenziare la RAM utilizzando lo slot libero nella scheda madre, fino ad un massimo di 64GB. La tastiera è retroilluminata con 2 livelli di luminosità, è in qwerty inglese ma il laptop è fornito di comode e morbide tastiere di silicone per supportare le principali lingue, italiano, la mia, e credo tedesco, francese e spagnolo. Sui siti cinesi è comunque possibile acquistare adesivi per la tastiera per tutte le lingue. La struttura è solida, in alluminio e plastica di buona qualità, il touchpad è reattivo e sensibile. Lo schermo IPS è di buona qualità. Il SO è Windows 11 professional. Il Laptop è leggero e da una buona impressione di solidità. Sicuramente è adatto per un gaming medio e per editing video professionale. Allego foto dell'analisi dell'hardware di HWINfo per aiutare i più esigenti. Riguardo alla batteria: sulla durata delle batterie ci sono varie scuole di pensiero, il mio: la durata della batteria è direttamente proporzionale a luminosità dello schermo, utilizzo GPU e CPU, altre periferiche connesse, uso della rete etc., quindi se la batteria dura meno del previsto fatevi una domanda e datevi una risposta ;-) (Gigi Marzullo Docet) Per € 420 posso dire di aver fatto un ottimo acquisto! tra l'altro pagato a rate a tasso zero con cofidis. Altamente consigliato.
      Read more
      Alberto Pinna
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Un ottimo laptop ad un giusto prezzo

      Reviewed in Italy on 4 November 2025
      Il Laptop corrisponde perfettamente alla descrizione, viene fornito con un cavo di alimentazione lungo ben 2 metri. Devo verificare se sia possibile caricarlo anche attraverso l'utilizzo della porta type-c alimentata, servirebbe un caricabatterie da almeno 65W, vedremo...L'imballaggio di amazon non era sufficiente a garantirne l'integrità ma alla fine il laptop non ha subito danni, anche perchè la confezione originale era perfettamente in grado di preservarlo da urti. La qualità audio è buona, sufficiente per ascoltare musica e video senza avere troppe pretese, i bassi sono appena sufficienti. L'hardware è di alto profilo, tanto che per avere le stesse caratteristiche con marchi blasonati occorrerebbe spendere cifre molto più alte. Non posso esprimermi per il gaming, non sono un appassionato, ma per un utilizzo quotidiano, office e navigazione o guardare film in streaming, è assolutamente perfetto, è anche possibile potenziare la RAM utilizzando lo slot libero nella scheda madre, fino ad un massimo di 64GB. La tastiera è retroilluminata con 2 livelli di luminosità, è in qwerty inglese ma il laptop è fornito di comode e morbide tastiere di silicone per supportare le principali lingue, italiano, la mia, e credo tedesco, francese e spagnolo. Sui siti cinesi è comunque possibile acquistare adesivi per la tastiera per tutte le lingue. La struttura è solida, in alluminio e plastica di buona qualità, il touchpad è reattivo e sensibile. Lo schermo IPS è di buona qualità. Il SO è Windows 11 professional. Il Laptop è leggero e da una buona impressione di solidità. Sicuramente è adatto per un gaming medio e per editing video professionale. Allego foto dell'analisi dell'hardware di HWINfo per aiutare i più esigenti. Riguardo alla batteria: sulla durata delle batterie ci sono varie scuole di pensiero, il mio: la durata della batteria è direttamente proporzionale a luminosità dello schermo, utilizzo GPU e CPU, altre periferiche connesse, uso della rete etc., quindi se la batteria dura meno del previsto fatevi una domanda e datevi una risposta ;-) (Gigi Marzullo Docet) Per € 420 posso dire di aver fatto un ottimo acquisto! tra l'altro pagato a rate a tasso zero con cofidis. Altamente consigliato.
      Images in this review
      Report
      Translate review to English
    • Dafne Bellandi
      5.0 out of 5 stars Potente e pratico per tutti i giorni
      Reviewed in Italy on 19 February 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Ho scelto questo computer portatile per lavorare e usarlo anche nel tempo libero. La cosa che mi ha colpito di più è la velocità: si accende in poco tempo e resta fluido anche con più programmi aperti. I 16GB di RAM e L’SSD da 512GB sono più che sufficienti per le mie esigenze quotidiane.
      Lo schermo è nitido e comodo per lavorare o guardare video. Apprezzo anche la copertura della webcam e le diverse porte disponibili.
      Per il mio utilizzo quotidiano è una scelta valida e bilanciata.
      Read more
      Dafne Bellandi
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Potente e pratico per tutti i giorni

      Reviewed in Italy on 19 February 2026
      Ho scelto questo computer portatile per lavorare e usarlo anche nel tempo libero. La cosa che mi ha colpito di più è la velocità: si accende in poco tempo e resta fluido anche con più programmi aperti. I 16GB di RAM e L’SSD da 512GB sono più che sufficienti per le mie esigenze quotidiane.
      Lo schermo è nitido e comodo per lavorare o guardare video. Apprezzo anche la copertura della webcam e le diverse porte disponibili.
      Per il mio utilizzo quotidiano è una scelta valida e bilanciata.

    • Antonio Zapata
      5.0 out of 5 stars ¡Compra totalmente acertada!
      Reviewed in Spain on 15 February 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Ya varios días usando este portátil ACEMAGIC con procesador Ryzen 7, puedo decir que ha superado mis expectativas. La experiencia desde el primer encendido ha sido muy fluida: arranque rápido, buen rendimiento y capacidad suficiente para trabajo diario, navegación intensiva, ofimática e incluso tareas más exigentes.
      El equipo se siente ágil gracias al procesador de AMD (Ryzen 7), permitiendo ejecutar múltiples aplicaciones sin bloqueos ni ralentizaciones. La pantalla ofrece buena nitidez y comodidad visual, el diseño es moderno y ligero, y la batería cumple correctamente.
      Destacable es su excelente relación calidad-precio. Es una opción muy equilibrada para quienes buscan productividad, estudios o trabajo sin tener que invertir en equipos mucho más costosos. Además, la entrega y el estado del producto fueron impecables.
      Recomiendo este portátil sin dudarlo: buen rendimiento, buena construcción y una compra que realmente vale la pena.
      Read more
      Report
      Translate review to English
    • Bz
      5.0 out of 5 stars impeccable
      Reviewed in France on 21 February 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Utilisation quotidienne absolument parfaite. Le processeur Intel de douzième génération gère facilement 30 onglets Chrome + Excel + Zoom en même temps. L'écran 15,6 pouces est lumineux et agréable. J'apprécie particulièrement le port Type-C pour recharger rapidement ou connecter des périphériques modernes. Le SSD 512 Go démarre Windows en quelques secondes.
